programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Money On The Line
programme.desc: In the first episode of a two-part season finale, Gloucester's reigning Bluefin champion Dave Carraro, of FV-tuna.com, starts the fishing season with a $20,000 lead over his rival.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Endgame
programme.desc: With only three days left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the captains of Gloucester race against each other - and an oncoming storm - in the battle to land their final fish of the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Wicked Return
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out for Jeffrey's Ledge in hopes of catching the first fish of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Checkmate
programme.desc: It's week two of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and the Gloucester captains and their crews, from rookies to old pros, get put to the test.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Into The Storm
programme.desc: Bad weather threatens to end the fishing week for the Gloucester fishermen, but while some boats head for home, others decide to take on Mother Nature's wrath.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Operation T.U.N.A
programme.desc: As the hunt for blue fin tuna intensifies, the fisherman resort to espionage for information.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bite Fight
programme.desc: It's the fifth week of the season and the entire fleet battle for the most successful fishing spots.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mission: Fishin!
programme.desc: As Gloucester's Bluefin tuna fleet charges into the heart of the fishing season, it's a tight race for the coveted title of top-earning boat.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bad Latitude
programme.desc: It's almost halfway through the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and the Gloucester fleet has hit a lull in fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle Royale
programme.desc: With the second half of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna fishing season now underway, competition amongst the Gloucester fleet intensifies when tuna become scarce.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Brotherly Shove
programme.desc: A new week calls for new techniques as the Gloucester Captains try unconventional methods to hook their next paycheck.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Blue Grit
programme.desc: Time is running out in the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and, this week, every boat in the Gloucester fleet is facing a different challenge.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Beta Kappa
programme.desc: The tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, know that they have to rely on each other to get the job done, but sometimes trusting the competition isn't such a good idea.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Three weeks left of bluefin tuna season, the Gloucester fleet is desperate to haul in a monster.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sharks and Recreation
programme.desc: With only three weeks left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the pressure begins to take a toll on the captains.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Mighty Bite
programme.desc: With only two weeks left in the fishing season and the price of blue fin tuna on the rise, the Gloucester captains race to bring in record hauls.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Reckoning
programme.desc: There is only one week of fishing left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and the Gloucester fleet is set for a final showdown in a bid to catch the last monster tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Head To Tail (Special)
programme.desc: It's a look back at the best moments from two seasons of Wicked Tuna, featuring the wildest catches and fiercest rivalries, plus a sneak peek at the upcoming third season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Wicked Return
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out for Jeffrey's Ledge in hopes of catching the first fish of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Degrees of Death
programme.desc: Dr. G suspects that someone is responsible for a vagrant's unusual death. She’ll only discover the truth by finding answers to the strange events surrounding this curious case.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Kiss of Death?
programme.desc: After a brief illness, 34-year old Claire Jackson dies suddenly in the hospital from massive liver failure and winds up in Dr. G’s morgue.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Decent
programme.desc: It’s up to Dr. G, along with the National Transportation Safety Board, to piece together how and why a plane crashed, leaving the pilot dead.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Stephen Klenczar – Bogus Barrister
programme.desc: Obsessed with boys toys, he posed as a barrister and claimed he worked for the British Government secret service.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files
programme.desc: Fake celebrity clairvoyant Williams preyed on the elderly by performing fake readings, including one where he directed his client to a forged will.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Paul Bint – The Chameleon Con Artist
programme.desc: Dubbed the British Frank Abagnale, Bint committed more than 500 offences including impersonating people.
programme.sub-title: Paul Bint – The Chameleon Con Artist

programme.title: 72 Hours: Cold Hit
programme.desc: In 1994, a troubled single mother is found raped and murdered in her apartment. Was it one of the volatile men in her life? All possible suspects are eliminated and the case goes cold for three years, until a nine-year old girl is brutally raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Faith Healer
programme.desc: A trucker at a roadside rest station discovers the fully clothed body of a dead East Indian woman.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Sweet Killer
programme.desc: An aging hippy is going through bad times. When he's found dead in his home with a gut of antifreeze, it's a closed case. Then a shocking confession reveals a maelstrom of lies and a story of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Predator
programme.desc: The phone rings in the middle of the night. On the other end of the line, the sounds of an attack. The couple that receive the call rush to its source and discover a horrific scene.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hate Crime
programme.desc: A young Orthodox Jewish man is in Pittsburgh to celebrate Passover with family when he is gunned down simply because of the way he is dressed.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hunted
programme.desc: A real estate broker doesn’t return home. Her family can't find her. But police do - dead in a closet in her office. The DNA on her body is tested against 150 men. No match. The case runs cold.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Burning Obsession
programme.desc: In 1988, a promiscuous 22-year old boy from the Sikh community has one affair too many and ends up losing his life. Diligent detective work and DNA help police nail the killer who believed he had gotten away with murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Model Killer
programme.desc: A gorgeous young model is bludgeoned to death in her downtown apartment. The wounds to her head are so severe police initially presume she's been shot.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Bull's Eye
programme.desc: A Girl Guide leader is found dead on the floor of her bedroom. When an autopsy reveals a bullet lodged in her brain, detectives learn they’re investigating a murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Evil Eyes
programme.desc: A dead woman is found in a park. It’s learned the deceased is a divorced landlady of a group home for transients. The suspect list is long; the clues to follow are few.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Thrill Kill
programme.desc: When a senior citizen is killed on a city street, authorities at first treat it as a typical hit-and-run accident. But as they investigate further, they begin to realize that the culprit is a thrill-seeking psychopath.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Hustler
programme.desc: Three people meet - the son of a wealthy Frenchman, a Vancouver businessman looking for investors. Unbeknownst to two of them, they are the latest victims of a notorious international con man.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Great Despisers
programme.desc: A 19 year old man comes home one night to discover that his family had all been savagely murdered. Could it be the insurance money and a movie called "The Great Despisers" that motivated the killers to perpetrate such violence?

programme.title: 72 Hours: Jeweler's Wife
programme.desc: The wife of a successful jeweler is found dead in their home. The jeweler immediately falls under suspicion, but he's not alone.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case)
programme.desc: On Sunday, April 29, 2007, the body of Jennifer Charron, 21-years old, was found burnt to a crisp in a forest near Royan. The young waitress, who had been missing for two days, was visibly beaten and tied up.
programme.sub-title: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Ste´phane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school
programme.sub-title: A Fatal Student Night (Ste´phane Kameugne Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)
programme.desc: On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato.
programme.sub-title: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)
programme.desc: On June 18, 2011, Marie-Jeanne Meyer, 17-years old, waved goodbye to her sister before leaving for her daily jog on the heights of Tournon in Ardèche. Three days later, her mutilated body was found in a freshly dug pit, near an area known to be cursed.
programme.sub-title: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Vale´rie Bary Case)
programme.desc: On Friday, March 26, 2004, in the region of Dijon, Laurent Bary came home from his work to discover the lifeless body of his wife, Valerie, bathing in a pool of blood.
programme.sub-title: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Vale´rie Bary Case)

programme.title: Surviving Evil: The Devil You Know
programme.desc: Jessica Carbone, 27, is living a good life in West Palm Beach, Florida. Shortly after moving into an affluent gated community, her life is shattered when a deranged, machete-wielding maintenance man breaks in, viciously attacks and kidnaps her.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Betrayal of Trust
programme.desc: Keri Reynolds’ job as a caregiver puts her into a near-fatal encounter with her own patient. Meanwhile, in California, a single mom battling an eating disorder looks to a personal trainer for help, but all he sees is someone to prey on.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Donatella Versace
programme.desc: Designer Donatella Versace's world in 1997 spins out of control when her brother Gianni is murdered.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Woody Harrelson
programme.desc: Woody Harrelson's portrayal of a serial killer may have been influenced by his father.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Roaming Rapist
programme.desc: For three weeks in May of 1994, a brutal killer had a nation on edge. A bloody spree of rapes, kidnappings, and murders resulted in the deaths of six Oklahoma residents.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Bully Kills
programme.desc: 14-year-old Reena Virk goes to a party at the Craigflower Bridge, near Victoria, Canada. It is there where her's friend's swarm, burn and beat her down.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Backpacker Killer
programme.desc: In the early 1990s, the tourist hotspot of New South Wales, Australia became a place of fear when backpackers started going missing.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Arbitrary Assassins
programme.desc: In November 1996, Raymond Collin went missing in his hometown of Timmins, Ontario. The discovery of his body days later in a snow-covered truck led police to an assortment of possible suspects.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Slave Master
programme.desc: Several women went missing from the Kansas City area in the 1980s and 1990s.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Silent Sniper
programme.desc: In March 1992 Claude Hawkins was shot dead while he was fishing in Ohio. Hawkins' murder mirrored multiple deaths in other nearby counties.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Elusive Rapist
programme.desc: In the winter of 1968, the prairie city of Saskatoon is ravaged by a string of savage rapes.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Terror by Text
programme.desc: On a wintry morning in Sweden, Alexandra Fossmo, wife of pastor Helge Fossmo, was found shot to death in her bed.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Human Hunter
programme.desc: Robert C. Hansen was known for his hunting abilities. In the early 1980s, however, his taste for hunting took a sinister turn.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Menthol Murderer
programme.desc: A week-long search for a missing 10-yr-old Indiana girl ends sadly with her body being discovered in a nearby stream.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Abducted Atheists
programme.desc: American Atheist Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her family vanished in August 1995, leaving behind an ominous note.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: When two suburban housewives are killed in their homes within a week of each other in May 1970, it leaves Toronto in fear.
programme.sub-title: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Doctor of Death
programme.desc: When emergency services arrived at the office of respected neurologist Richard Boggs following the report of a patient's death, they had their suspicions regarding the circumstances...

programme.title: Crime Stories: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist
programme.desc: On December 11, 1987 a hard luck child living in a group home in Ontario was reported missing when she failed to return home from school.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Homocidal Drifter
programme.desc: In the city of Moncton, New Brunswick police discover the bodies of Joan Hicks and her 11-year-old daughter, Nina ‚Äì both brutally murdered late in the night.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3
programme.desc: In this week’s episode, Bristol biker paramedic Wingnut has a tough case on his hands. A woman is stuck in the mud on the banks of the river Avon.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: A suspected heart attack and a desperate search to try and find two riders who could be seriously injured are two cases facing Bristol biker paramedic Dean Wingnut Wiltshire.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 9
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire the biker cops of the county’s road traffic squad spring into action. PC Lee Cobb races to respond to an emergency call and find that a motionless motorcyclist has been catapulted over a roundabout.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 5
programme.desc: The Westpac chopper crew attempt to save a Waiheke man who has life-threatening injuries after falling off a ladder and a motocross rider is in a bad way after a 100-foot jump goes badly wrong.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 3
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 team battles to save a man trapped in his overturned Land Rover on Rakino Island; a star rugby player at Onewhero may have broken his neck after a scrum collapsed, and a man out cycling on Waiheke is clinging to life after a cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 4
programme.desc: The chopper team has an intense struggle to keep a young Waikato woman alive after her car collided with a heavy truck, an 18 year old man is in terrible pain with a dislocated shoulder, and a 9 year old boy is in a bad way after falling out of a tree.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 11
programme.desc: A woman is badly hurt after being knocked down a bank by her pet goat, a man is found with serious injuries on a remote beach, and 11-year old girl has fallen down a bank and suffered suspected spinal damage.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 7
programme.desc: Auckland's Westpac helicopter crew races to save a 39 year old forestry worker who has been struck on the head leaving him paralyzed from the waist down.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: A motocross rider may have broken his back after hitting a tree head on at high speed, at a sawmill a man faces its worse nightmares; and a woman is fighting for her life after taking an accidental overdose of her husband's medication.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9
programme.desc: The team have received a status 2 callout; Mark Lorimer was knocked out and has multiple injuries after being hit head-on by another vehicle.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 7
programme.desc: The chopper team are about to take off to rescue a seriously injured man.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors: Episode 40
programme.desc: The doctors treat patients in search of pain relief.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors: Episode 41
programme.desc: A rugby player comes in with a toenail hanging by a thread.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors: Episode 42
programme.desc: The doctors treat patients surprised by sudden injury.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors: Episode 43
programme.desc: John fears that his drooping eyelids may indicate a stroke.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 4
programme.desc: A&E deal with a man who fell off a roof and the victim of an overturned car.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 9
programme.desc: A woman has a life-threatening allergic reaction to nuts. A man has an arm injury.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 4
programme.desc: Physiotherapist helps 90-year-old Audrey who bashed her head in the hospital restaurant.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 6
programme.desc: A man is treated after being involved in a serious motobike accident.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Biker cop Lucy Watson is out in the Essex salt marshes where a lorry, caught by the tide, is stuck in the mud. Fellow biker cop Stomp pulls over an overloaded van and encounters a face that’s no stranger to TV.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 8
programme.desc: In Birmingham, biker paramedic Steve Harris races to an amateur football match where events have taken a dramatic turn. Stranded in a muddy field, his patient gripped by pain, Steve is left with only one choice – he has to scramble the air ambulance.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Paramedic Mark Hayes responds to a stabbing and has to rescue a woman from a car crash who's on her way to her critically ill baby. The Emergency Bikers go head to head in a battle of biking skill.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Biker paramedic Mark Hayes has to deal with an aggressivedrunk in the city centre and a young woman with epilepsy who's had several seizures. Biker cops in Essex are on a special night op hunting illegal road users.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 2
programme.desc: New doc Jake's first patient has fallen down the stairs.

programme.title: Scorpion: Super Fun Guys
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover on the "Super Fun Guy" movie set in Kazakstan in order to disable a Soviet-era nuclear missile being sold by terrorists.

programme.title: Scorpion: Tech, Drugs, and Rock 'n Roll
programme.desc: Walter's attempt to "normalize" goes horribly wrong when a nefarious virus is uploaded to his computer.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crazy Train
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must stop a sabotaged runaway subway train with Paige and Ralph on board. Also, in his attempt to impress Happy, Toby has his first boxing match.

programme.title: Scorpion: Area 51
programme.desc: To help fund Walter's research into saving his sister's life, Team Scorpion takes a lucrative job for the CIA to find a top-secret aircraft in the mysterious Area 51.

programme.title: Scorpion: US vs. UN vs. UK
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is blackmailed to break into the United Nations to assist in the assassination of a menacing arms dealer.

programme.title: Scorpion: Arrivals And Departures
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion and Walter's parents visit Megan in the hospital as her health deteriorates, they are quarantined after a deadly fungus outbreak threatens to infect everyone.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Old College Try
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover at a university to find a hacker who infiltrates the Federal Reserve and threatens to collapse the world economy.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dam Breakthrough
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Team Scorpion must prevent a catastrophe when torrential rains create a large crack in a dam, threatening to wipe out an entire town in its wake.

programme.title: Scorpion: White Out
programme.desc: In order to save a United States Special Forces unit from certain death, Team Scorpion must brave the subzero temperatures of Antarctica.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sun of a Gun
programme.desc: Sylvester comes face to face with his estranged father who asks Team Scorpion for help.

programme.title: Scorpion: Da Bomb
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is helping with NASA's top secret rocket launch, but they must sabotage their own mission.

programme.title: Scorpion: Fractured
programme.desc: After a powerful earthquake rocks Los Angeles, Team Scorpion must fix a pinched gas line to prevent a massive explosion.

programme.title: Scorpion: Adaptation
programme.desc: While Team Scorpion works to stop an influx of drugs being smuggled into the country via drones, Walter gives Happy and Toby an ultimatum on their new relationship.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Fast & The Nerdiest
programme.desc: After Sylvester scores big on THE PRICE IS RIGHT, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a high-end car smuggling operation about to ship bioweapons to South America.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ticker
programme.desc: When Los Angeles' blood supply is hacked and deemed unusable because of fear it's been tainted, Team Scorpion must find the culprit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: While on a secret mission in Djibouti, Africa, with his new Homeland protege, Tim Armstrong (Scott Porter), Cabe is captured and Team Scorpion must save him.

programme.title: Scorpion: Twist And Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's mission to recover the remains of fallen Marines in Vietnam is threatened along with their lives when a deadly tornado heads directly towards them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is hired by the Department of Defense to break into Fort Knox and "steal" a precious artifact in order to test their security.

programme.title: Scorpion: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes to Chernobyl to repair the decaying nuclear reactor before a catastrophic meltdown.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Guardian
programme.desc: Wing Saber hurries to the space bridge in the sky. However, he was not there in time and the space bridge begins to fall apart due to the battle that had just occurred. Lori grieves that she cannot return to her home world.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Homecoming
programme.desc: Galvatron uses his might to pull Earth, the Speed Planet, and the Jungle Planet through space bridges forcing all Transformers to unite and fight against him.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: End
programme.desc: Optimus approaches Galvatron to take the Omega Lock and Planet Keys. However, Galvatron is drawing out the power of the Planet Keys, and Thundercracker, Thunderblast, Ransack, and Crumplezone grow to giant size.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Unfinished
programme.desc: Galvatron who is worn out and without power wanders through the universe. At that time, something shining catches his eye. The voice of Starscream is heard and asks "Have You Given Up?".

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Beginning
programme.desc: Representatives of each planet have successively gathered together on Cybertron. The first Space Peace Conference opens with Optimus Prime. Optimus Prime makes a proposal for the construction plan of a new space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Inferno
programme.desc: In the final episode of Cybertron peace has settled on the Earth, but new information will reveal why Landmine arrived on Earth and not elsewhere and why Scattershot had such unusual reading when they arrived.

programme.title: Transformers: Cyberverse I
programme.desc: Windblade arrives at Earth before the Decepticons and meets her old friend Bumblebee, who doesn't recognize her.

programme.title: Transformers: Cyberverse I
programme.desc: Windblade is trying to make Bee understand who Megatron is.

programme.title: Transformers: Cyberverse I
programme.desc: To convince Bumblebee that he is a Decepticon, Shockwave traps him in a false memory.
programme.sub-title: Sabotage/Teletraan - X/Matrix of Leadership/Siloed/King of the Dinosaurs

programme.title: Transformers: Cyberverse I
programme.desc: The newly formed team of Autobots must stop Shockwave from destroying all life on the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Cybertron City
programme.desc: It's been 10 years since Megatron disappeared, and the Autobots and Decepticons now work side by side with humans to harvest Energon. But the Autobots face a new threat: attacks by Transformers known as Terrorcons.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Energon Stars
programme.desc: After analyzing the Terrorcon threat, the Autobots decide to send away all the civilians living in the Energon mining bases.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Scorponok
programme.desc: Scorponok captures Tidal Wave and makes him follow his orders so that they can revive Megatron with energon.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Megatron's Sword
programme.desc: Tidal Wave sees Megatron's sword.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The New Cybertron City
programme.desc: Super Optimus Prime emerges to find his team searching for Energon.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Megatron Resurrected
programme.desc: Megatron is alive again and forces Scorponok to serve him, but Scorponok is loyal to only one master Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Megatron Raid
programme.desc: Megatron launches his first Energon raid since his resurrection.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Starscream the Mysterious Mercenary
programme.desc: Alpha Q has revived Starscream, whose mission is to destroy Optimus Prime, to regain a new body.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Battle of the Asteroid Belt
programme.desc: The Autobots go into the asteroid belt to see what is going on after seeing something on radar, and find parts of Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Energon Tower
programme.desc: A new Autobot weapon is revealed that unleashes vast destruction to the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Legend of Rodimus
programme.desc: Alpha Q prepares to bring Unicron to life, while yet another Energon Tower is secured into place.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Crisis in Jungle City
programme.desc: Alpha Q is not ready to let Earth go without a fight, and sends a group of stealth Terrorcons, named Command Ravage and Blackout.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Kicker Beware
programme.desc: Megatron forces Demolishor to divulge the Autobots' secret of finding energon: Kicker.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Energon Grid
programme.desc: Megatron has taken yet another plan, to create three meteors from Unicron and propel them at Earth before the energon grid has been completed, which he feels will “strike fear in Optimus Prime.”

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Rodimus: Friend or Foe?
programme.desc: While Snow Cat tests his power against the Energon Grid by sending frozen asteroids, Megatron decides to go after Alpha Q instead of Earth after finding a Terrorcon spy.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Go For Unicron!
programme.desc: Optimus reveals their mission is twofold: they are also going to destroy Unicron, and they prepare to set up a space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Return of Demolishor
programme.desc: The Autobots face a new threat: for Demolisher is revived in a new power, who is tougher than ever.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: A Tale of Two Heroes
programme.desc: The Autobots continue on their journey and intercept a Decepticon warp signal which turns out to be Rodimus's ship. Rodimus asks permission to aboard and Optimus obliges.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Battle Stations
programme.desc: The autobots continue their planning on taking out Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Alpha Q: Identity
programme.desc: Unicron's arrival causes the Decepticons on Cybertron to rebel, while Kicker learns the truth about Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Laser Wave: Rampage
programme.desc: Shockblast disables Cybertron's energon grid, while Kicker tries to convince the Autobots to listen to Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Survival Instincts
programme.desc: Starved for Energon, both Unicron's head and body begin lashing out at their respective captors.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Each One Fights…
programme.desc: Megatron commands Shockblast to lead an assault on Cybertron to take out the Energon towers, and allow Unicron to “feed” on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Unicron Unleashed
programme.desc: Megatron uses the Energon to revive Tidal Wave into Mirage.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Open Fire
programme.desc: As the Autobots fought their way to Megatron within Unicron's body and with Megatron throwing everything at them, Alpha Q provides support by fighting for the control of Unicron.

programme.title: Survivorman: Costa Rica
programme.desc: Marooned on Costa Rica's Osa Peninsula, Les "Survivorman" Stroud has only a few items to aid him for the next 7 days: swimming goggles, 3 ballpoint pens, a multi-tool and the clothing on his back.

programme.title: Survivorman: Cook Islands, South Pacific
programme.desc: Les, equipped with only his scuba gear, is abandoned by his crew at sea to recreate a frightfully common occurrence; separated from your boat and left alone in the ocean waters.

programme.title: Survivorman: Incan O'ero High Priests
programme.desc: Les and crew climb to 16,000 ft up dangerous Mt. Sinkara to join 80,000 indigenous Andeans as they make their yearly pilgrimage to the holy site of Qollorit'i.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Les plants himself in Bigfoot hot spots across North America, collecting stories and experiences from Bigfoot believers, gathering and examining evidence to debunk the mysteries that surround this ancient legend.

programme.title: Survivorman: Georgian Swamp
programme.desc: The swamplands of Georgia's Altamaha River Basin are all that one would expect of a primordial bog; dank, menacing, swimming with slithering creepy crawlies and of course, alligator infested.

programme.title: Survivorman: Indonesia Mentawai
programme.desc: Les begins at the island of Siberut. He journeys 9 hours up river by boat, navigating log-jammed river systems and shallow waters, eventually trekking by foot into the heart of the island.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Lost Pilot Summer
programme.desc: This one-hour special chronicles Les's first time surviving for the cameras in August of 2001. With just two cameras, a few items and his wits, Les survives in the Canadian wild.

programme.title: Survivorman: Legend of Klemtu Hill
programme.desc: There's a volcano in British Columbia where Bigfoot reports are in the hundreds. According to locals, a mysterious animal leaves tracks and even kills people. Les braves the dangers of this Bigfoot hotspot to find the truth behind these strange reports.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tonga
programme.desc: Les strands himself on a deserted island in the archipelago of Tonga with a long-time friend to relive the story of marooned sailors.

programme.title: Survivorman: Canadian Boreal Forest
programme.desc: The Boreal Forest is home to 85 species of mammals including; moose, deer, bear and wolves. Crisscrossed by rivers and lakes, the Boreal forest is frost-free for only about three months of the year.

programme.title: Survivorman: MacGyverisms
programme.desc: This show features Les' best tips and tricks, the methods that Les has created over his 25-year career of surviving that he calls McGyverisms.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Jungle
programme.desc: Les treks through the thick mountain rainforest to survive on the peak of Grenada's largest active mountain. Mona Monkeys, tarantulas, scorpions, armadillo, parrots and possums all live in this vibrant ecosystem, offering an abundance of food and danger.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tonga
programme.desc: Les strands himself on purpose, accompanied by his long-time survival buddy Bob Wilson, on a deserted island in the Kingdom of Tonga.

programme.title: Survivorman: Temagami Forest
programme.desc: Les returns to the oldest mountain ranges in North America, The forests of Ontario's Temagami, to survive for ten days with no food, no water, no shelter, no safety and no camera crew. Facing the dangers of packs of wolves and vigilant moose.

programme.title: Survivorman: Frigate Island
programme.desc: Les first strands himself on an uninhabited island called Frigate an active volcano chain found in the Grenadine Islands deep. Surviving on the island means scouring the shoreline, securing freshwater, building a shelter and making fire.

programme.title: Survivorman: Oregon
programme.desc: Les recreates the real life story of family who were lost and stranded for six days in the forests of Oregon.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Lost Pilot Winter
programme.desc: Les Stroud's first time surviving for the cameras in the dead of winter. Les ventures to remote Northern Ontario to endure temperatures of -40 degrees F for a week alone.

programme.title: Survivorman: India
programme.desc: Les takes his survival skills to the Indian subcontinent, where he accidentally stakes out a shelter right in the heart of a tiger's territory.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Island
programme.desc: Les journeys to an active volcano chain found in the Grenadine Islands. Stranding himself on an uninhabited island called Frigate, Les is left to survive on his own.

programme.title: Survivorman: Dangers
programme.desc: Les Stroud packs 25 years of survival knowledge into one 45- minute crash course in this fast-paced new compilation.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1998, Corey Parker was stabbed more than 100 times in her flat. Her murderer left a wealth of DNA evidence. However, he proved incredibly difficult to find.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Forensics unpick the point-blank shooting of Wesley Person. Although his body was burnt beyond recognition, unbelievably minute details prove key to solving the crime.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: By cutting a strand of a murdered man's hair into sections, forensics reveal a record of his last six months alive, and find he was frequently ingesting huge amounts of arsenic.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver, and no witnesses. An ambush or a random attack? The clue was something so tiny, it was measured in millionths of a metre.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a teenager is found by a road with her throat slit, police hope that a cast of nearby tyre tracks and a hair found in a cut on her thumb will lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Detectives search for the man who murdered two women in an apartment block. Despite setting light to their flats, a tiny oversight ensured this serial killer got life.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks after a student vanishes, the body of an unknown female is found in the ashes of a fire 700 miles away. An alert policeman realises the crimes could be connected.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Karen Pannell was found brutally murdered next to a wall that bore a name in blood. Had she desperately written her killer's name?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The assistant manager of the restaurant had been stabbed to death. Police knew why he'd been killed, but by who?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The convenience store safe was empty and the clerk missing. Hours later, her bound, half-naked body was discovered in a nearby wooded area.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In the story of a Los Angeles kidnapping, ransom and murder ring, retired scientists use sonar equipment to locate victims at the bottom of a reservoir.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead from a gun-shot wound, police suspect her husband. However, forensic teams prove what really happened and the truth is stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A 70-year-old retired veteran is found dead on his boat after a bad sea storm; detectives discover he was killed during an attempted robbery after winning $400 in keno.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A Texas love triangle turns deadly, and it appears to be an open and shut case until technology tells the tale.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: July Fourth weekend leads to tragedy for a California family. To catch a killer, detectives utilise an unorthodox technique - analysing bug fragments - to help put a murderer behind bars.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A family mourns the unexpected death of a beloved grandmother at Christmas. While local police assure everyone that she was a victim of a tragic accident and that there is no foul play, some things about the scene just don't add up.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a true crime hobbyist connects a Utah Jane Doe to an Ohio missing persons case, detectives are hard-pressed to solve the decades-old murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young Colorado mother suddenly vanishes on Thanksgiving Day. When police trace her cell phone, it leads them to a surprising character with an even more surprising story.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Eight days after she had disappeared on her way to a family ski trip, an 18-year-old young woman's partially nude body is found floating in a river in Wyoming, Years later, DNA technology uncovers dark secrets that led to her demise.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When the 20-year-old clerk of an Atlanta-area smoke shop is gunned down during a robbery, investigators have only descriptions of the killers and the make of their getaway car; investigators use a videotaped confession to smoke out the killers.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: California police are baffled when an innocent man's DNA is found at the scene of a deadly home invasion, and authorities team with the man's defence attorney.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: This episode investigates the shooting of 15-year-old Trey Cooley, who died from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while he sat in the lobby of his father's gun club.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1976, 180 war veterans in Philadelphia were hospitalised with pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 died. The disease resurfaces every few years.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators study a family in South Dakota whose son, a vegetarian, hasn't become sick. The US Department of Agriculture steps in to review the use of thyroid hormones in meat.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: This is the story of an 11-year-old boy, who almost died after eating a badly cooked burger teeming with E-Coli, and the Medical Detectives who saved his life.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Florida police search for a serial rapist and murderer who left small red fibres on each of his victims.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When an English couple goes missing, police who suspect their son has killed them must rely on mud and blood forensics to find their bodies.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Experts attempt to discover the source of heavy fog on Highway I-75 in Tennessee, which caused a 99-car accident and 12 deaths.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a woman goes missing from her home, police focus on her husband when an airline luggage tag points to an affair and murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: You may be too scared to listen to your radio after watching this episode, as a man poisons his neighbour for having the volume up too loud.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting and simple doodles turn an attempted murder bombing case into something very different in a peaceful British farming village.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When dozens of infants develop serious breathing problems in the Cleveland area, doctors and investigators search high and low for the cause.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a Vancouver custodian finds a burnt body in a skip, investigators determine the identity of the body and the attacker.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman poisoned her husband and others but was caught when an algicide enabled the police to prove her guilt.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Evidence reveals a teacher who complained of being stalked and harassed by another teacher was scamming police.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man kills two people with bombs in an effort to get investors off his back and is sentenced to life with no chance of parole.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man arrested for the sexual assault and attempted murder of a boy in a European country is linked to a murder in Zurich, Switzerland.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Heavy rains and snow runoff carry manure into Milwaukee's water supply, making 400,000 people ill.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Sinking Wings
programme.desc: The goal is to turn the coastal waters off southern British Columbia in Canada into the wreck-diving capital of the world by sinking massive objects, wait a few years for the fish to move in, and the corals to grow.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Glitz City
programme.desc: In Las Vegas -- the quintessential city of razzle-dazzle and bling -- MGM is going for the ultimate one-upmanship.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Floating Bridge
programme.desc: Engineers had no choice. They had to build a "floating bridge" in Kelowna, British Columbia. Lake Okanagan was too deep and too muddy to sink columns to support a standard bridge.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Raising the Roof
programme.desc: A new iconic stadium rises in Rio De Janeiro. The futuristic Joao Havelange Olympic Stadium will be the main venue for the 2007 Pan Am Games.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Extreme Surf Machine
programme.desc: Although Christoph Kiessling is now running “the best waterpark in the world” with the world’s largest artificial wave - it’s still not enough. This megalomaniac millionaire is always dreaming of bigger and better things.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Spanning the Saigon River
programme.desc: In Ho Chi Minh City (formerly known as Saigon), engineers are on a mission to modernize. Construction is underway to raise Phu My Bridge, a brand-new $100 million cable-stayed bridge.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Rungis Food Market
programme.desc: Rungis International Market is the world's largest wholesale market for fresh produce. Fish, meat, fruits, vegetables, cheese and even fresh flowers are sold here every day in quantities so large an entire train station.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Shinjuku Station
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes of the world’s busiest station: Shinjuku Station! Five separate train lines, almost three thousand passengers per minute and trains arriving every second.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Munich Airport
programme.desc: The Munich based Franz Joseph Strauss Airport is rated the only 5-Star airport in Europe. And it is also one of Europe´s biggest hubs. An average 1.100 flights have to be taken care of every day, 44.6 million passengers chose Munich as destination.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: UPS Worldport
programme.desc: What does it take to deliver millions of packages and documents every day right in time? You need a Giant Hub: UPS Worldport in Louisville is a technological marvel. It is the largest automated package handling facility in the world.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Moscow Metro
programme.desc: It is one of the biggest and busiest metro systems in the world: The Moscow Metro. During rush hour the trains are running every 90 seconds to transport around 9 million people daily – that makes 2.3 billion a year.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Port of Rotterdam
programme.desc: The Port of Rotterdam is among the largest logistics centers in the world. With a handling capacity of about one million three hundred thousand tons – per day!

programme.title: Mega Builders: Bangkok Bridge
programme.desc: The new 13-km Industrial Ring Road will be a combination of elevated roads, bridges and tunnels, designed to help ease the congestion in Bangkok.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Ice Hotel: Bigger, Colder
programme.desc: Building an eighty-room hotel of snow and ice in just six weeks every year isn’t a big problem for Ake Larsson, but the weather certainly is.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Peak Power
programme.desc: Deep in Canada's rugged western coastal mountains a new hydroelectric project is underway. It's a 600 million dollar venture diverting massive glacial rivers into a huge pipeline built against down steep mountain slopes.

programme.title: Mega Builders: World's Biggest Wave Machine
programme.desc: On the resort island of Tenerife, just off the coast of North Africa, a small army of designers and labourers are building what will be the largest man-made surfing wave in history - and one of the most ambitious waterparks ever conceived.

programme.title: Mega Builders: World Class Stadium
programme.desc: South Africa has a lot riding on being the host of the next FIFA World Cup. It's important and prestigious. Cape Town is building a brand-new stadium for the occasion - with a challenging high-tech roof.

programme.title: Mega Builders: The Big Lift
programme.desc: In a city known for building big, Hong Kong is about to set the standard for bridges around the world. But it’s not just its massive 300 metre towers or 1 kilometre span across open water that will set Stonecutters Bridge apart from other bridges.

programme.title: Wardens: Michigan Bears
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers enforce bear hunting regulations in a variety of ways; the state's DNR uses many methods to track the state's bear numbers.

programme.title: Wardens: Firearm Opener
programme.desc: November 15 is Michigan's firearm opener each year and is like Christmas for many hunters and Conservation Officers alike.

programme.title: Wardens: Snowmobiles and Oktoberfest
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers patrol a weekend party and make sure snowmobilers are riding safely.

programme.title: Wardens: White Bass Patrol
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers observe anglers from a distance to make sure they're doing things by the book before contacting them when they suspect illegal activities.

programme.title: Wardens: River Patrol
programme.desc: Conservation Officers patrol a busy river during a summer weekend and efforts are made to improve fish habitats.

programme.title: Wardens: Buck Warrant and ORV Stickers
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers in District 8 tread cautiously as they execute a search warrant at a residence of an individual convicted of dealing drugs. And a CO in the UP checks out an off-road vehicle that doesn't have the proper stickers.

programme.title: Wardens: Michigan Elk
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers in District 3 investigate a bull shot with a cow tag as well as another elk that was shot on private property without permission.

programme.title: Wardens: D4 Salmon
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers look into salmon taken illegally,including in a closed stream and with illegal gear. A CO instructs a family on where to fish legally.

programme.title: Wardens: Deer Seasons
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers patrol during the opening days of deer season for hunting with both archery equipent and firearms. A CO helps remove two deer from an elementary school after they crashed through a window in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Wardens: Lost Gill Net and ORV
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers remove a gill net from Lake Michigan that had been lost and was discovered by recreational divers. Also, C.Os in District 7 patrol ORV riders

programme.title: Wardens: Storms on St. Clair
programme.desc: An early summer party on the water in southeastern Michigan gets a wake up call when storms roll through the area. Conservation officers help a man who drank too much get medical attention and try to reign in the chaos after the storm.

programme.title: Wardens: Snagging and Trespassing
programme.desc: Conservation officers monitor the fall salmon run in West Michigan and try to bring to justice anglers who are keeping foul-hooked fish. They also try to help a landowner whose property has accumulated a lot of trash from trespassers.

programme.title: Wardens: Beavers, Elk, and a Squirrely Hunter
programme.desc: A man in northern Michigan shoots from his vehicle and claims to be sighting his gun in on a squirrel in an area with deer and elk. He also claims that he was on his way to work so he is okay to be driving.
programme.sub-title: Beavers, Elk, and a Squirrely Hunter

programme.title: Wardens: Mutilated Fish and Classroom Salmon
programme.desc: Officers in Michigan's Upper Peninsula check snowmobilers and ice fishermen. Also, a look into the state's Salmon in the Classroom program that teaches students about their state's ecosystem and makes them responsible for young salmon.

programme.title: Wardens: Autumn Deer, Bear, and Woodcock
programme.desc: A conservation officer in Michigan's Upper Peninsula investiages a case where a firearm may have been discharged too close to an occupied dwelling. Also, information on the Woodcock Wingbee when Michigan hosted the event.

programme.title: Wardens: Bay Winter Blitz
programme.desc: Officers in Michigan's thumb region execute a group patrol from snowmobilers and ice anglers and an officer in the northern Lower Peninsula looks into a deer that may have been illegally shot on private property.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her. But when Andy realizes that the serial rapist we never caught is back, it’s all hands on deck to find Traci

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Home Run
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail’s relationship with her brother is put to the test . Meanwhile, Swarek plans a getaway with Andy up to Oliver’s cabin, which goes off the rails in every possible way

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation into 15 Division. They only have until end of day today to find Chris Klem – the missing explosives-dealer – and clear Oliver’s name

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Integrity Test
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15’s evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky – and potentially career-ending – plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: Andy heads out with a very-pregnant Marlo to find a volatile woman who’s gone missing after group therapy, but neither Andy nor Marlo are prepared when Marlo suddenly goes into labor.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived (Ep. 520), it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment. So when Juliet offers Andy an opportunity to leave town for 4 months on an undercover project, Andy starts to consider it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: Andy and Sam’s wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah. But when Andy is taken off-course by a hitchhiker and then stranded on the side of a dead-end road with a dying man, she finds herself with no way to get help

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a mysterious young girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy McNally connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.
programme.sub-title: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Class Dismissed
programme.desc: As local high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of an armed police car. While tracking down the stolen vehicle, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a volatile teen boy

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Good Shoot
programme.desc: Dov Epstein happens upon a convenience store robbery-in-progress that results in him shooting a young black teenager.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girl’s Night Out
programme.desc: On Traciʼs first day as a detective, all hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver. Jerry discovers that the driver of the parked car was dead before the accident.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Messy Houses
programme.desc: While answering a domestic disturbance call, Andyʼs personal life is turned inside out when the social worker on the scene turns out to be her estranged mother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe -- a homeless squatter whoʼs been stabbed in the warehouse

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: When a gifted psychic - or, at the very least, a gifted conman - enters 15 Division to help find the missing witness in an organized-crime case, the officers are forced to come face-to-face with some of the hidden truths

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a grad-student-turned escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women. Since Gail fits the physical description of the victims, she is sent on an undercover sting at a high-end hotel

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Out Of Time
programme.desc: After the officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator, the grim discovery of the body of a missing girl reopens an unsolved case – bringing back Detective Luke Callaghan in from the Homicide Squad to oversee it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Cold Comforts
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are still reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues. When they discover that a laptop has been stolen containing sensitive information, they set out to tie up several of open cases

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Rules
programme.desc: Itʼs “back to basics” for 15 Division when Staff Sergeant Frank Best decides itʼs time for his officers to get back on track

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Every Man
programme.desc: A seasonʼs worth of trials and tribulations come to a head during a frenzied night at the station when the distracted rookies improperly search a prisoner

programme.title: Rookie Blue: I Never
programme.desc: When a violent child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal -- only to discover that heʼs taken another young victim

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Based on a memoir, four children struggle to grow up in a rambling, poverty-stricken, wildly unconventional environment overseen by their dysfunctional yet uniquely loving parents.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: After his brother is presumed dead in Afghanistan, a drifter (Jake Gyllenhaal) and his sister-in-law (Natalie Portman) are drawn together through their grief and unexpected attraction.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: Young Marine Cpl. Megan Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive combat dog that she trains. Together, they complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

programme.title: War of the Buttons
programme.desc: In World War II France, the leader (Jean Texier) of a children's gang falls for a Jewish girl, leading his gang and their rivals to consider putting aside their differences in order to protect her from the Nazis.

programme.title: The Choice
programme.desc: An irresistible attraction leads to a blossoming romance between a feisty medical student (Teresa Palmer) and her new neighbor (Benjamin Walker).

programme.title: From Prada to Nada
programme.desc: After the sudden death of their father leaves them penniless, two spoiled sisters (Camilla Belle, Alexa Vega) get a rude awakening when they must live with their aunt in East L.A.

programme.title: War of the Buttons
programme.desc: In World War II France, the leader (Jean Texier) of a children's gang falls for a Jewish girl, leading his gang and their rivals to consider putting aside their differences in order to protect her from the Nazis.

programme.title: The Choice
programme.desc: An irresistible attraction leads to a blossoming romance between a feisty medical student (Teresa Palmer) and her new neighbor (Benjamin Walker).

programme.title: From Prada to Nada
programme.desc: After the sudden death of their father leaves them penniless, two spoiled sisters (Camilla Belle, Alexa Vega) get a rude awakening when they must live with their aunt in East L.A.

programme.title: Sanctuary: For King and Country
programme.desc: With Adam under tight security back at the Sanctuary, Magnus starts to process the events of the past 24 hours. She discloses to Will how she was associated with Adam back at Oxford in the late 1800s, and the turbulent role he played with The Five.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Vigilante
programme.desc: Knowing that the cure for Magnus’s illness can only be found in the hidden City, Will decides to release Adam from his restraints so he can show them how find the City’s access point.

programme.title: Sanctuary: The Hollow Men
programme.desc: Now with the real keystone in her possession, Magnus tells Adam Worth she is leaving to find the hidden city. Although he warns her of great danger there, she insists he stay behind and promises to bring back the cure to their radiation illness

programme.title: Sanctuary: Pax Romana
programme.desc: When we left Magnus, Will, Henry and Kate, they had met with a hostile welcome upon gaining access to the city of Praxis in Hollow Earth.

programme.title: Flash Gordon Conquers the Universe: The Destroying Ray
programme.desc: Flash Gordon, Dale Arden and Dr. Zarkov return to the planet Mongo for an antidote to the Purple Death, which wreaking destruction on Earth. However, Ming the Merciless has other plans for them.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Brennan's shady ex-girlfriend turns to him for help when her latest scam takes a deadly turn.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The team faces its most dangerous mission yet: stopping a group of eco-terrorists.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Brennan is upset with Adam, who tells him that he was entrusted to keep a secret and leaves after talking to that person. The man is looking for someone and is willing to kill anyone to get to that person.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The team goes undercover to investigate unexplained deaths in a prison.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Shalimar is sent undercover in a deadly high-tech assassination ring, to find why they want Adam dead.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The team steps in to protect a main prosecution witness whose life has been threatened prior to the trial.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: A Jiridian probe headed for Earth is shot down by the Taelon Embassy and crashes outside of D.C. Liam recovers the probe, but he, Augur, and Julia are captured by another underground resistance movement led by the real Colonel Liam Kincaid.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Crossfire
programme.desc: As the election draws near, Liam believes Zo'or is trying to have Jonathan Doors murdered. The Resistance worries that an attack is imminent at the final debate. Julia mobilizes a group to protect Doors against Liam's wishes.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Crackdown
programme.desc: An unknown woman saves Augur and Liam from the raids on the Resistance. Lili sabotages the mother ship, but Zo'or stops its total destruction. Lili is reportedly dead. The investigation on the President's shooter continues.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Vanished
programme.desc: Some who were detained during the Resistance sweep have not reappeared after their release. Lili is taken to a lab run by Sandoval and implanted. Renee tries to help Liam find the missing people.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Emancipation
programme.desc: A group posing as volunteers attacks using a stolen skrill prototype that does not require an implant to control. It is discovered that the skrill queen is also missing. The investigation leads to a resistance group called Black Wednesday.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Déjà Vu
programme.desc: A joint Doors International/Taelon venture creates a machine that allows people to vividly relive a memory, but Liam suspects a back alley version of the device is leading to the death of some users.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Once and Future World
programme.desc: Artifacts believed to be Taelon are found in South America. Renee and Liam try to beat Sandoval to the source to determine the importance of the found pieces.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Thicker than Blood
programme.desc: An old business partner of Augur's is hired by Da'an to get information about the Resistance, resulting in the death of many members. Meanwhile, Sandoval finds out he has a life threatening blood disorder.

programme.title: The Lost World: Ice Age
programme.desc: A new Ice Age threatens the ecosystem. The explorers investigate the site of a meteor crash and try to help a woman. Not knowing who she is, they are targeted by her cold-blooded subjects.

programme.title: The Lost World: The End Game
programme.desc: The intractable Death comes to settle her score with Lord Roxton. In a series of games, Roxton plays Death in an attempt to keep his life, as well as the lives of his friends.

programme.title: From the Mothman to the Reptilians: A Guide to Alien Species
programme.desc: Witnesses from around the world have had close encounters with extraterrestrial races, shaping our imagination and becoming cultural phenomena.

programme.title: 27 Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Strange and bizarre UFO encounters abound, but recent Alien encounters by highly credible eyewitnesses are so unusual and perplexing that they challenge our understanding of physics and the Universe as we know it.

programme.title: Ancient Engineers: Aliens On Earth
programme.desc: Our evolution may be influenced by our ancestors and their Gods. We are not alone in the universe.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Belgian UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Belgian UFO, (Pts. 1 & 2), UD: I.D. Swap, Brenda's Fire and Philip Breen & UD.

programme.title: Alien Mass Sightings: The Undeniable Truth
programme.desc: Documentary analyzes mass alien sightings, questions reliability of official explanations, identifies common patterns for further investigation.

programme.title: Alien Global Threat
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that world governments have had a pact with aliens for decades and that human abductions are being allowed by government and military factions.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Kecksburg UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kecksburg UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Pizza Man & 3rd Anniversary Reunion, Unknown Arsonist & UD and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: Alien Crash Retrievals
programme.desc: Learn the shocking truth about extraterrestrial beings on planet Earth. World governments and military factions are not only aware of the Alien presence; they may be in communication with alien races.

programme.title: UFO Hunters II: Tales from the Universe
programme.desc: Italian ufologists explore alien evidence in history & folklore. Have we been watched since ancient times?

programme.title: Area 51, Roswell Crash, Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Area 51 is located at the center of UFO research and legends of extra-terrestrial folklore. It is located six hundred miles west of Roswell, New Mexico, where the infamous Roswell UFO crashed in 1947. Also in this episode The Allagash Alien Abductions .

programme.title: Alien Cyclops: The Extraordinary Case of Sagrada Familia
programme.desc: In 1963 Brazil, three children witness a UFO in their backyard. An alien cyclops descends, and Mr. Alberto investigates the phenomenon.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: UFO Odyssey
programme.desc: This episode includes: UFO Odyssey, Reporter's Trucker and Haunted Mansion.

programme.title: The Falcon Lake Incident
programme.desc: Aliens visit Earth often; Canada's 1967 Falcon Lake UFO incident stands out. Canada's frequent sightings make it enigmatic.

programme.title: Aliens in the USSR
programme.desc: Unsolved Soviet Union Alien Mysteries: Dyatlov Pass incident, Petrozavodsk miracle, Voronezh case. Amaze and frighten, but doubt of alien involvement.

programme.title: Abducted by Aliens: UFO Encounters of the 4th Kind
programme.desc: Are we being taken by beings from outer space or another dimension? A troubling phenomenon has been occurring for centuries.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Sketch rids Ben of a silly spooning tattoo. Jay fixes Matt's backside-based chat-up line.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 3
programme.desc: House fire survivor Steve has his scarring covered with a Celtic knot design, Amy swaps an embarrassing marriage proposal for a tribute to her favorite dinosaur, and Sam's X-rated nickname is hidden.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14
programme.desc: Sketch and Jay double team Luke's bum art, Alice eases Katie's period pain, Glen puts a snowman on ice while Sketch tattoos a butcher who minced his arm off.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: John's tattoo is on another planet, while Alec has made a big mistake with a tiny inking.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 9
programme.desc: Lou helps Will to cover a famous face in an intimate place. Jay assists model Gigi, who has the initials of not one, but two exes on her breast. Chris has a tattoo dedicated to his best friend's mum.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Scott's terrible tattoo takes his love for Norwich City FC too far. Jay has space-loving Dan's back with an out-of-this-world cover. Sketch tackles a cover to help transgender Jai feel more feminine.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 3
programme.desc: At the parlour in the sun Sketch meets Peter who's shocking tattoo is double trouble. Glen rids Kieran of a Holiday fling and Alice gives Jenny a tribute to her organ donor.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 5
programme.desc: The pop up parlour in the sun gets a visit from a noughties heartthrob. Glen transforms Dave's shoddy shot glass. Sketch gives Zoe a bespoke design, Alice helps Jodie get rid of a bad decision and Glen rids Max of his unusual love.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 2
programme.desc: The Tattoo Fixers on Holiday are back in the sunny Med, and this week Glen licks Gabriela's tat into shape, Sketch covers Eileen's saucy self-portrait and Alice gives Aimee a confidence boosting original.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 5
programme.desc: The Tattoo fixers take on Mother-loving Ryan, Carly's puckered up revenge tat and Scots silly holiday slogan. Meanwhile Girls on tour Sam & Ellie, Paralympian Jess and Tattoo fanatic Liam all head to the parlour for some ink action.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 4
programme.desc: At the parlour in the sun, Glen meets drunk tattoo collector Jack. Sketch rids Dylan of a reminder of his past & Jay gives Julie a portrait she can cherish forever.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jay, Sketch and Alice face Scott's manscaping stickmen, Chelsea's superfan signature, and Jack's silly souvenir. Meanwhile, fun-loving divorcee Kat, partygoing parents Kay and Richard, and diabetic Sean all go under the needle.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 8
programme.desc: Jay conjures up an Amy Winehouse masterpiece, Alice crafts an amazing geometric wolf and sketch creates matching tattoos for Amy and Chantelle. Also looking for tattoo therapy is Wonky-eyed Shannon, gambling man James and Tat mad Dan.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 7
programme.desc: The Fixers holiday hijinks continue, and this week Glen rids Mandy of her rabbits, Jay pulls off the perfect portrait and Alice gets her teeth into Helen's cupcake.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 8
programme.desc: Sketch takes on Bex whose stinker of a tat has left her feeling unloved, Alice helps Nikki with a tat that has mistakenly mugged off her husband and Glen creates an elegant design for Emma who has overcome a brave battle with Anorexia.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch hides a Kardashian catastrophe, Alice gives Lana's emoji a facelift, and Jay is moved by a family's story of bravery.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 2
programme.desc: Jay is taking on best mates Sam and Laura's cheeky stickmen, Sketch is helping out Aaron with a lads holiday regret and spontaneous Danny's Magaluf mistake is Wrecked'tified.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 1
programme.desc: Tattoo Fixers on Holidays is back and this week new arrival Glen banishes bad boy Ashley's Magaluf moto, Sketch helps Bobby get rid of his rank rabbit, Alice gives Rachel a sentimental design, and Jay strips Clair of an awful ex tat.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 3
programme.desc: The Fixers are putting bad tatts to bed in the sunny Med. Jay is taking on Tom the Titty Whacker, Alice helps out Catherine a Cher impersonator with a awful orchid and Sketch destroys a Alex's bad boxing tat.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A grand tour of the Ferrari Roma production facility in Northern Italy. Titch lifts the lid on an icon of the sixties, the series one Jaguar E-type.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: The armoured BMW X5 is the perfect hybrid of when armoured cars meet supercars. Titch Cormack reveals just what it takes to design and build a car that can come under enemy attack.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A visit to the Croatian production facility of the Rimac C Two. Titch Cormack hits the jackpot when he discovers a barn full of a game-changing technically advanced Aston Martin Lagonda's.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A trip to the Bentley Bentayga headquarters in Crewe reveals just how a luxury SUV is designed, built and delivered to the customer. Titch Cormack is in Cornwall uncovering a game-changing early SUV.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Catie Munnings tests the BAC Mono R at Goodwood Circuit, Duncan Pittaway explores the classic Bugatti Type 35, and engineer Dan Dickrell heads off to Florida to witness swamp racing.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: The Tesla Model S is put under the spotlight. Car customiser Elo is in Florida tracking down the Sebring Vanguard Citicar.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: In a re-run of the first ever British Grand prix, a rare pre-war race car, the Halford Special, is lined up to compete against a well-preserved Bugatti.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A young racing driver learns how to handle the unique and venerable racing car the Napier-Railton, built in the 1930s. Plus, a race winning Harrier jump-jet, and its pilot, are reunited.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: The motorbike team create a new lubrication system to keep a 1930s BSA motorbike running. Plus, a Mini Metro and red Corvette turn heads at the Members Classic Car Show.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A rare Brooklands glider is given a new chance at flight. Plus, a 1930s race team is pushed to the max at Goodwood.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: A look at the life of Mary Magdelene, a key figure in Christianity who witnessed Jesus's crucifixion and resurrection after travelling with him.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Mystery still surrounds how fascist dictator Benito Mussolini met his end, before being hanged in Milan's Piazzale Loreto. Jamie Theakston seeks out answers.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The Vatican Secret Archives is a treasure trove of history that is shrouded in secrecy. Jamie Theakston heads to Rome in a bid to gain access.
programme.sub-title: The Secrets of the Vatican Archives

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston travels to Jerusalem to research and attempt to uncover the real story of Jesus and what historical truths there might be to find within the pages of the Bible itself.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie goes beyond the Iron Curtain of the Cold War to explore East Germany. In particular, he is interested in the real story behind East Germany's notorious State Security Service: the Stasi.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston finds out what Hitler planned to do with his stolen art and discovers that he was also after an unusual item, a spear that pierced the side of Christ.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston explores the world of James Bond and asks what is real about Ian Fleming's famous character. Along the way, Jamie considers whether Ian Fleming's own life experiences might have served as inspiration.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston visits Qumran Caves near the Dead Sea to uncover the truth about a set of manuscripts found there. He explores who wrote them and why they were hidden.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston investigates the idea that secret societies and clandestine groups are covertly exercising political influence across the globe. In the process, he explores the Freemasons, Bilderberg Group and Bohemian Grove.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America

programme.desc: Eddie squares up to the fearsome Mac & Cheese Challenge at Brooklyn's Mac Shack, which weighs in at more than two kilograms and nearly 7,000 calories of pasta, cheese and sauce.
